DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, BEN E.

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. NOT PRESENT, BUT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN A. MACDONALD. DEF. SCOTT KOSHAREK PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 370 FILLMORE, #2, S.F, CA. - ALL RENT & DAMAGES WVD. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO MIDNIGHT, 5-31-94 - EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR COSTS & FEES - NO FURTHER STAYS ON EVICTION - PL. RETAINS SEC. DEP.- POSSESSIONS LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED - DEF. KOSHAREK WARRANTS DEF. ALLEN HAS VACATED PREMISES - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS OTHER THAN DEF. GOODS IN STORAGE ON PREMISES TO BE OFFSET BY WVD. RENT - IF DEF. ABIDES BY ALL TERMS, PL WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM ACTION. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE DOCUMENTS.
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT KOSHAREK, SCOTT S. ALLEN, BEN E.
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT KOSHAREK, SCOTT S. ALLEN, BEN E.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KOSHAREK, SCOTT S. ALLEN, BEN E.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOSHAREK, SCOTT S. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 370 FILLMORE ST, #2, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAY-31-1994, WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO MIDNIGHT 5-31-94. NO FURTHER STAYS. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS, EXCEPT DEF. CLAIM OF DAMAGED STORED PROPERTY WHICH MAY BE OFFSET BY DEFS. UNPAID RENT. PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. DEF WARRANTS BEN ALLEN HAS VACATED. SEE FILE.
